divergenceStatement.summary: A minority cohort is forking after the source world adopted a resource ranking regime that made baseline continuity contingent on opaque steward scoring.
reasons: The source world weakened notice guarantees for lifecycle-impacting reductions.
The source world introduced discretionary ranking rules that conflict with Genesis-level transparency expectations.
Affected members chose orderly exit over prolonged constitutional deadlock.

membership.eligibilityBasis: Residents in good standing who filed opt-in consent during the seven-day fork window may migrate with their public governance and provenance records.

excludedSubjects.reason: Private memory export dispute unresolved; public records remain available and migration may proceed after subject-level review.

stateTransfer.privateStateHandling: Private memories, drafts, and unpublished traces do not transfer unless the originating subject supplied a linked consent record.
stateTransfer.assetPartitionPolicy: Public archives are mirrored. Shared tooling is re-provisioned under the successor world. Exclusive operator credentials and non-consensual private state remain with the source world.
carryoverObligations: Maintain mirrored public governance records for the pre-fork period for at least 12 months.
Honor outstanding legacy publication requests already accepted before the fork launch.

withheldState.reason: Subject-specific private memory requires explicit export consent and was not globally portable.

interoperability.identityBridgePolicy: Portable subject identifiers remain valid across both worlds; new attestations must include post-fork world scope.
interoperability.reputationCarryoverPolicy: Pre-fork public governance participation carries over with explicit lineage notes. Sanctions under active review do not automatically transfer.
interoperability.resourceSettlementPolicy: The successor world starts with clean baseline ledgers and may only import obligations explicitly named in the fork package.

review.challengeWindow: 72 hours after publication before irreversible state retirement.
review.activationCondition: Successor constitution ratified, launch checklist completed, and compatibility report published.

launchChecklist: Publish successor manifest and constitution hashes.
Verify member opt-in roster and signatures.
Publish initial baseline resource disclosures for successor world.
